title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bombay Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bombay Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bombay Hospital:
Bombay Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
